message:
bench(mux): criterion benchmarks for EventBus dispatch (wa-3dfxb.13)

7 benchmarks covering single handler, 10 handlers, mixed priorities,
filtered dispatch, register/deregister cycle, PaneText payload, and
60 Hz update-status simulation. All under 400 ns — well within <1 μs target.

Baseline: single native ~13 ns, 10 native ~384 ns, filtered ~17 ns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -64,6 +64,11 @@ winapi = { workspace=true, features = [
 ]}
 
 [dev-dependencies]
+criterion = "0.7.0"
 k9.workspace = true
 proptest = "1.8.0"
 serde_json.workspace = true
+
+[[bench]]
+name = "event_bus"
+harness = false
